lastReleaseMessage: 20-improvement sweep: fix stale print-path and setState comments; drop the dead section-focus listener; save indicator flashes and announces only on real saves; orientation repaint dedupe; safe boot-failure screen; fonts-ready autofit skips detached nodes; patchNested creates missing path objects; lazy-load html2canvas with an SRI pin on first export; add favicon, canonical, OG meta, noscript; shortcut dialog backdrop dismiss; aria-labels on saved-label actions; new test-data-integrity.mjs plus a node-import guard that un-breaks test-render.mjs; real v1.0.2 changelog bullets; README runtime-dep and tests sections; delete script .bak leftovers

barRaise.topFinding: Apothecary shipped v1.0.3 (commit 7797427) the day of the last pass, a 20-item quality sweep that raised several dimensions and added no new risk. The standouts are real hardening: the boot-failure screen now builds via textContent instead of innerHTML (src/main.js) and html2canvas is lazy-loaded behind an SRI sha512 pin on first export (src/util/export-png.js), a security and first-load win. patchNested now backfills missing path objects so old saved state cannot throw (src/state.js), autofit skips detached nodes, and a new test-data-integrity.mjs adds data coverage. All three pills agree at v1.0.3, the tree is clean, no npm artifacts, only the .example webhook stub is tracked. The two remaining items are deferred LOWs; nothing is actionable this run.
